text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black takes first place in the Osaka Hai,
defeating Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio are among those
watching from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond can feel Kitasan Black's leap in
strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, she's determined to win next time.
The two promise to face off again at the spring
Tenno Sho.
